title: Ape X Mecha Ape: New World Order
original_title: Ape X Mecha Ape: New World Order
overview: A group of world leaders awakens a creature beneath the ocean floor, and mankind's only hope rests on an alliance between the giant ape and his mechanical arch-nemesis.
